KEY EVENT: ONDO LONG triggered at $0.43 — price entered zone after -5.3% profit-taking pullback; whale signal STRONG_BULL unchanged, JPM/Ripple live settlement intact, composite +0.71 HIGH conviction. BTC LONG still WAITING ($76K-79K); if CLARITY passes bullishly, entry may need adjustment upward.
